title: CAM Partners Anchal Dhir and Shubham Rastogi resign to join Anagram Partners
description: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas (CAM) Corporate Partners Anchal Dhir and Shubham Rastogi are joining Anagram Partners.Confirming the exit, CAM Managing Partner Cyril Shroff said,“Anchal is an excellent lawyer and great human being. I have had the privilege of mentoring her for 2 decades. And will continue to do so. I wish her the very best in life. We will miss her at CAM.“A 2007 alumna of NALSAR, Hyderabad, Dhir has nearly two decades of experience advising major Indian conglomerates, global corporat
